message:
🐛 Handle 401/403 gracefully in multi-tenancy card fetchers (#2788)

When the backend returns 401/403 (no auth token), return empty initial
data instead of throwing. This prevents "Refresh failed" errors when
viewing the multi-tenancy dashboard without login — useCache falls back
to demo data cleanly.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
